requirements.text: Create a valid Codex plugin project named codex-trace-miner.
Add seven requested skills with clear triggers, workflows, and outputs.
Add session-start, pre-tool-use, and stop hooks with conservative behavior.
Add optional MCP only for real read-only context.
Add source index, extracted patterns, operating protocol, eval plan, scorecard, and README.
Upgrade Trace Miner into a routed behavior system with skill-router and trace-researcher.
Create a clean flow from source links to behavior patterns, runtime skills, MCP context, and eval checks.
Expose read-only structured patterns through MCP and validate the behavior-system artifacts.
Study the requested Fable 5-related public sources with trace-researcher and record safe source metadata, inspected surfaces, accepted patterns, and rejected content.
Add accepted source-derived behavior patterns to patterns/patterns.jsonl with classification and destination fields.
requirements.evidence: patterns/patterns.jsonl includes PAT-008 through PAT-017 and all records include classification/destination

requirements.text: Update only affected runtime skills while keeping them concise.
requirements.evidence: skills/skill-router, trace-researcher, trace-miner, context-router, planning-architect, requirements-ledger, implementation-pack, finalguard-review, debug-autopsy

requirements.text: Add eval checks for source hygiene, routing, tool fallback, acceptance gates, and review packet safety.
Run phase 2 aggregate source study without storing raw dataset rows, prompts, chain-of-thought, or tool outputs.
requirements.evidence: docs/source-notes.md records aggregate-only Glint, armand0e, and kelexine evidence

requirements.text: Reclassify unsupported or redundant patterns so weaker claims stay docs/eval-only.
Add runtime confidence gating and aggregate-only research rules without expanding unrelated skills.
Add eval checks for aggregate evidence, truncation awareness, and tool-loop behavior.
Automate Codex App tool routing for CodeGraph, Serena, Context7, Trace Miner MCP, and safe fallbacks.
requirements.evidence: AGENTS.md, README.md, docs/tool-automation.md, docs/routing-guide.md, skills/context-router/SKILL.md, skills/skill-router/SKILL.md

requirements.text: Initialize and index CodeGraph locally while keeping local indexes out of git.
Expose tool automation guidance through the read-only MCP server.
requirements.evidence: mcp/trace_miner_server.py exposes get_tool_automation and tests assert it is listed

requirements.text: Commit all owned changes with title/description and push to origin.
requirements.evidence: All owned changes will be staged explicitly, committed, and pushed; final response records commit and push result.

requirements.text: Add Codex-only Trace Fusion workflow without OpenRouter, external model API, hosting, fine-tuning, Fable prompts, raw trace rows, or chain-of-thought.
Add project-scoped custom Trace Fusion agents with one-write-owner discipline.
Add Trace Fusion eval and structured behavior patterns.
requirements.evidence: eval/fusion-scorecard.md and PAT-023 through PAT-027 in patterns/patterns.jsonl

requirements.text: Expose Fusion protocol and modes through read-only MCP tools.
Update routing docs and usage for Trace Fusion.
Add validation for Fusion skill, custom agents, patterns, and MCP tools.
Harden PreToolUse guard against broad staging and recursive deletion commands.
requirements.evidence: hooks/pre_tool_use_guard.py and tests/test_hooks.py block git add ., git add -- ., git add -A/--all, git stage ., Remove-Item -Recurse, rm -r/-rf/-fr/-Recurse, and rmdir recursive forms.

requirements.text: Harden Stop guard against stale ledgers for dirty Git worktrees.
requirements.evidence: hooks/stop_guard.py requires workspace_state.changed_files to match current git status --short; tests cover missing and divergent snapshots.

requirements.text: Rename MCP server to Fable Mode and expose Fusion scorecard.
requirements.evidence: .mcp.json uses fable-mode; MCP initialize returns Fable Mode; get_fusion_scorecard is listed and callable.

requirements.text: Make MCP robust for invalid JSON-RPC input.
requirements.evidence: mcp/trace_miner_server.py returns -32700 for parse errors and -32600 for non-object payloads; tests cover both.

requirements.text: Align safety rules and confidence gating across finalguard, trace-miner, source-index, skill-router, and patterns.
requirements.evidence: finalguard checks external APIs/OpenRouter/hosting/fine-tuning and stale ledgers; source-index forbids trace messages; medium patterns no longer include skill rule.

requirements.text: Document current ledger snapshot requirement.
requirements.evidence: skills/requirements-ledger/SKILL.md documents workspace_state.changed_files from git status --short.

risks.description: Before/after behavior eval has not been run yet.
armand0e dataset license/provenance was not visible in inspected page output; use schema/metadata only until clarified.
Source pages exposed row-level trace content in public viewers; no raw rows were stored, but future research must keep using structural evidence only.
Aggregate scans support structural/tool/recovery conclusions, but do not prove semantic model quality or correctness of individual traces.
Hugging Face rows API rate-limited during the first kelexine row scan attempt; the study used public cleaning/analysis reports instead of forcing pagination.
The user said opengraph; implementation assumes they meant CodeGraph, the Codex App code graph tool. If they meant web OpenGraph metadata, that is a separate task.
Trace Fusion custom agent TOML is project-scoped and validated locally, but final Codex App loading behavior depends on the app custom-agent loader.
Fusion scorecard exists, but no before/after Fusion behavior run has been completed yet.
Older ledgers without workspace_state.changed_files will block finalization on dirty Git worktrees; this is intentional to prevent stale validation.

next_action: Run final validation after ledger snapshot refresh and report changed files, validation, and residual risks.
